mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dts_notifications (recipient_id, actor_id, ticket_id, type, message, is_read, created_at) SELECT #{recipientId}, #{actorId}, #{ticketId}, #{type}, #{message}, false, NOW() WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM users WHERE id = #{recipientId})
mapper.select: SELECT n.id, n.recipient_id, n.actor_id, u.display_name AS actor_name, n.ticket_id, n.type, n.message, n.is_read, n.created_at FROM dts_notifications n LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = n.actor_id WHERE n.recipient_id = #{recipientId} ORDER BY n.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dts_notifications WHERE recipient_id = #{recipientId} AND is_read = false
mapper.update: UPDATE dts_notifications SET is_read = true WHERE id = #{id} AND recipient_id = #{recipientId}
UPDATE dts_notifications SET is_read = true WHERE recipient_id = #{recipientId} AND is_read = false
